zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Higgins於1603年8月1日出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾時，他的父親Richard Edward Higgins57歲，母親Julian Elizabeth Meals21歲。他於1634年12月11日與Lydia Chandler在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1669年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯且於1670年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加新泽西米德萊可比斯卡塔瓦。他於1669年被列為planter。他去世於1675年6月21日在美國新澤西州米德萊可比斯卡塔瓦享年71歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦可福 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Higgins于1603年8月1日出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾时，他的父亲Richard Edward Higgins57岁，母亲Julian Elizabeth Meals21岁。他于1634年12月11日与Lydia Chandler在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1669年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯且于1670年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加新泽西米德萊可比斯卡塔瓦。他于1669年被列为planter。他去世于1675年6月21日在美国新泽西州米德萊可比斯卡塔瓦享年71岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦可福 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Higgins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hUiginn ‘descendant of Uiginn’, a byname meaning ‘viking, sea-rover’ (from Old Norse víkingr). Compare McGuigan .

English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Higgin, itself either a Lancashire variant of Huggin (from a pet form of Hugh ), or a variant of Hickin (from a pet form of Richard ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. See Hick and compare Higson .

variants.name: McGuigan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Mairead.
Irish (northern): perhaps an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the viking’ (see Higgins 1).
Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Guagáin, a shortened form of Mag Eochagáin, son of Eochagán, a diminutive of Eochaidh ‘horseman’. Compare Geoghegan .

variants.name: Kiggins
meanings: Irish (Galway and Mayo) and Manx: shortened Anglicized form (with English excrescent -s) of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the Viking’ (see Higgins ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest Grave seen in the Memorials List

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Higgins was born on 1 August 1603, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Edward Higgins, was 57 and his mother, Julian Elizabeth Meals, was 21. He married Lydia Chandler on 11 December 1634, in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He lived in Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1669 and Piscataway, Middlesex, New Jersey, British Colonial America in 1670. In 1669, at the age of 66, his occupation is listed as planter. He died on 21 June 1675, in Piscataway, Middlesex, New Jersey, United States, at the age of 71, and was buried in Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Higgins è nato il il 1 agosto 1603 nel Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Edward Higgins, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Julian Elizabeth Meals, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lydia Chandler il 11 dicembre 1634, nel Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Vissuto a Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1669 e nel Piscataway, Middlesex, New Jersey, British Colonial America nel 1670. Nel 1669, all'età di 66 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come planter. Morì il 21 giugno 1675, nel Piscataway, Middlesex, New Jersey, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Higginsが1603年8月1日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Edward Higginsは57歳，母Julian Elizabeth Mealsは21歳であった。1634年12月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスでLydia Chandlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1669年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスに，1670年にはイギリス植民地アメリカニュージャージー州ミッドレセックスピスカタワイに住んでいた。1669年，66歳の時，職業はplanterと記録されている。彼は1675年6月21日にアメリカ合衆国ニュージャージー州ミッドレセックスピスカタワイで71歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルエアスサムコブ ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Higgins(이)가 1603년 8월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Edward Higgins(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Julian Elizabeth Meals(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1634년 12월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에서 Lydia Chandler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1669년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스에서, 1670년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴저지 주 미들레세스 피스카타웨이에서 살았다. 1669년, 66세의 나이로 그의 직업은 planter이었다. 그는 1675년 6월 21일 미국 뉴저지 주 미들레세스 피스카타웨이에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 이스섬 커브 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Higgins nasceu em 1 de agosto de 1603, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Edward Higgins, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Julian Elizabeth Meals, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lydia Chandler em 11 de dezembro de 1634, em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele viveu em Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1669 e em Piscataway, Middlesex, New Jersey, British Colonial America em 1670. Em 1669, com 66 anos, sua profissão aparece como planter. Ele faleceu em 21 de junho de 1675, em Piscataway, Middlesex, Nova Jérsei, Estados Unidos da América, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Higgins родился 1 августа 1603 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Edward Higgins было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Julian Elizabeth Meals, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lydia Chandler 11 декабря 1634 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он жил в местности плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1669 году и в местности пискатавеи, миддлесекс, Нью-Джерси, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1670 году. В 1669 году, в возрасте 66 лет,  он работал по профессии planter. Он умер 21 июня 1675 г. в местности пискатавеи, миддлесекс, Нью-Джерси, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности ков буринг гроунд, эастам, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Higgins nació el 1 de agosto de 1603, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Edward Higgins, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Julian Elizabeth Meals, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lydia Chandler el 11 de diciembre de 1634, en Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Vivió en Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1669 y en Piscataway, Middlesex, New Jersey, British Colonial America en 1670. En 1669, a la edad de 66 años, su ocupación registrada era planter. Murió el 21 de junio de 1675, en Piscataway, Middlesex, Nueva Jersey, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
